children.heading: .—Soliciting Commission of Offenses Generally
children.label: a .—Soliciting Commission of Offenses Generally
children.text: Any person subject to this chapter who solicits or advises another to commit an offense under this chapter (other than an offense specified in subsection (b)) shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.

children.heading: .—Soliciting Desertion, Mutiny, Sedition, or Misbehavior Before the Enemy
children.label: b .—Soliciting Desertion, Mutiny, Sedition, or Misbehavior Before the Enemy

children.text: if the offense solicited or advised is attempted or is committed, shall be punished with the punishment provided for the commission of the offense; and
if the offense solicited or advised is not attempted or committed, shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
